overview: A world-class interactive portfolio website for ADITHIYAN A, an Aspiring VLSI & Embedded Systems Engineer. Features 10 sections including a hero with animated circuit background, experience timeline, project showcase with filtering, animated skills, achievements, certifications, gallery, career roadmap, and contact form. Built with premium neumorphism/glassmorphism design and light/dark mode.
features: Hero section with animated circuit background and 3 CTA buttons
About section with split layout and engineering narrative
Experience timeline with QMOS Technologies and NSIC internships
Projects showcase with filter (FPGA/IoT/AI) and modal popups
Animated skills section with progress bars and chip tags
Achievements highlight for IIT Madras PALS INNOWHA 2025
Certifications card gallery with expandable modals
Photo gallery with masonry grid and hover effects
Career vision roadmap with animated flow
Contact form with backend storage, light/dark mode toggle
